message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'sk_mem_reclaim_final' sets signal field 'sock.sk_reserved_mem', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=sock;field=sk_reserved_mem;offset=268] [oracle:assert=sock.sk_reserved_mem stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets sk_reserved_mem without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
